name: Delivery Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for total delivery cost analysis per shipment, incorporating Lean logistics, Six Sigma variability, and WERC warehousing standards.

inputs.label: Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total route distance from origin to destination, used for fuel and time cost calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total route distance from origin to destination, used for fuel and time cost calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başlangıç noktasından varış noktasına toplam rota mesafesi, yakıt ve zaman maliyeti hesaplamaları için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Fuel Cost per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Current average fuel price per liter, directly impacts variable transport cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current average fuel price per liter, directly impacts variable transport cost.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güncel ortalama yakıt fiyatı (litre başına), değişken taşıma maliyetini doğrudan etkiler.

inputs.label: Fuel Efficiency (km/L)
inputs.businessContext: Vehicle fuel consumption rate in kilometers per liter, key for fuel cost estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vehicle fuel consumption rate in kilometers per liter, key for fuel cost estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aracın kilometre başına litre cinsinden yakıt tüketim oranı, yakıt maliyeti tahmini için anahtar.

inputs.label: Driver Wage per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage of the driver, including benefits and overtime provisions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage of the driver, including benefits and overtime provisions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sürücünün saatlik ücreti, yan haklar ve fazla mesai hükümleri dahil.

inputs.label: Average Speed (km/h)
inputs.businessContext: Expected average travel speed including traffic and stops, used to compute travel time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected average travel speed including traffic and stops, used to compute travel time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Trafik ve duraklar dahil beklenen ortalama seyahat hızı, seyahat süresini hesaplamak için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Load Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of cargo, affects fuel consumption and handling costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of cargo, affects fuel consumption and handling costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam kargo ağırlığı, yakıt tüketimini ve elleçleme maliyetlerini etkiler.

inputs.label: Handling Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost for loading/unloading and warehouse handling per kilogram of cargo.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost for loading/unloading and warehouse handling per kilogram of cargo.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilogram kargo başına yükleme/boşaltma ve depo elleçleme maliyeti.

inputs.label: Vehicle Maintenance per km
inputs.businessContext: Average maintenance cost per kilometer, including tires, oil, and repairs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average maintenance cost per kilometer, including tires, oil, and repairs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lastik, yağ ve onarımlar dahil kilometre başına ortalama bakım maliyeti.

rules.message: Fuel efficiency outside typical range (2-40 km/L). Verify input.
Load weight exceeds standard truck capacity (25,000 kg). Consider heavy-haul equipment.
Express delivery to remote zone may incur additional surcharges.

thresholds.message: Fuel cost is above 2.5 currency/L. Consider fuel surcharge or route optimization.
Total delivery cost exceeds 5000 currency. Review cost drivers for reduction opportunities.
Cost per kg exceeds 5 currency. Benchmark against industry average (WERC).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
